entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: Ons kan die Terms op elke moment wysig deur die gewijzigde voorwaardes op hierdie site te plaas. Die is jou verantwoordelikheid om hierdie Terms periodiek te besluitkijken. Jy voortdurende gebruik van die Platform nadat hersiene Terms is geplaas, beteken dat jy die veranderings accepteert en ermee instemt. Van jy word verwacht dat jy hierdie bladsy regelmatig kontroleert zodat jy op die hoogte is van veranderings, omdat hulle bindend vir jou is. Deur ons Diens te bly besoek of gebruik nadat hersieningen van kracht word, gaan jy ermee akkoord gebonden te is aan die hersiene voorwaardes. As jy nie akkoord gaan met die nuwe voorwaardes, ben jy nie langer gemachtigd om Diens te gebruik.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: Ons kan persoonlike data wat ons versamel of wat jy verskaf openbaar maak: Openbaarmaking vir regshandhaving: onder bepaale omstandighede kan ons verplig is jy Data openbaar te maak as die wet hierdie vereist of as reaksie op geldige versoeken van owerhede. Besigheids transaksie: as ons filiale of ons betrokke is by 'n fusie, overname of verkoop van activa, kan jy Personal Data word overgedragen. Ander gevalle. Ons kan jy inligting ook openbaar maak: aan ons filiale en gelieerde ondernemingen; aan kontrakteurs, diensverskaffers en ander derde partye wat ons gebruik om ons maatskappy te ondersteun; om die doel te vervul waarvoor jy die inligting verskaf; om wat logo van jou maatskappy op ons webwerf op te neem; vir enig ander doel dat ons bekendmaak wanneer jy die inligting verskaf; met jou toestemming in ander gevalle; as ons glo dat openbaarmaking nodig of gepas is om die regte, eiendommen of veiligheid van die Company, ons klanten of ander te beskerm.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: Ons kan eksterne maatskappye en persone inschakelen om ons Diens te faciliteren ("Diens Providers"), Diens namens ons te lewer, Diens-verwante dienste uit te voeren of ons te help ontledingren hoe ons Diens word gebruik. Hierdie derde partye wat net toegang tot jy Personal Data om hierdie take namens ons uit te voeren en is verplig hierdie nie openbaar te maak of vir enig ander doel te gebruik.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: Ons kan betaale produken en/of dienste binne Diens aanbied. In dat geval gebruik ons dienste van derde partye vir betalingsverwerking (bijv. betalingsverwerkers). Ons bewaar of versamel jy betaalkaartdata nie. Die inligting word regstreeks verskaf aan ons eksterne betalingsverwerkers, waarvan die gebruik van jou persoonlike data word geregeld deur hulle Privacy Policy. Hierdie betalingsverwerkers hou homself aan die normen van PCI-DSS, beheer deur die PCI Security Standards Council, 'n gesamentlike inspanning van merken soos Visa, Mastercard, American Express en Discover. PCI-DSS-vereisten help te zorgen vir veilige verwerking van betalingsinligting.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: Ons kan jy rekening beeindigen of opschorten en die toegang tot Diens onmiddellijk blokkeren, sonder voorafgaande kennisgeving of aanspreeklikheid, na ons eie diskresie, om watter reden dan ook en sonder beperking, insluitend maar nie beperk tot 'n skending van Terms. As jy jy rekening wil beeindigen, kun jy simpelweg stoppen met die gebruik van Diens. Alle bepalingen van Terms wat na hulle aard na beeindiging moet voortduren, bly na beeindiging van kracht, insluitend, sonder beperking, eiendomsbepalingen, gaanrantiedisclaimers, vrywaring en beperkings van aanspreeklikheid.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: Ons kan ons Privacy Policy van tijd tot tijd bijwerken. Ons vra jy op die hoogte van veranderings deur die nuwe Privacy Policy op hierdie bladsy te plaas. Ons laat wat jy weten via e-mail en/of 'n opvallende kennisgeving op ons Diens voordat die wijziging van kracht word en werk die "effective date" bovenaan hierdie Privacy Policy by. Jy word geadviseerd hierdie Privacy Policy periodiek te besluitkijken op veranderings. Wijzigingen in hierdie Privacy Policy word van kracht wanneer hulle op hierdie bladsy word geplaas.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: Ons kan remarketingdienste gebruik om op webwerwe van derde partye aan jou te adverteren nadat jy ons Diens wat bezocht. Ons en ons eksterne leveranciers gebruik cookies om advertenties te inlig, optimaliseren en tonen op basis van jou eerdere besoek aan ons Diens.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: Ons kan eksterne Diens Providers gebruik om wat ontwikkelingsproses van ons Diens te automatiseren.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.
entries.value: Ons kan eksterne Diens Providers gebruik om die gebruik van ons Diens te monitor en te ontledingren.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: Ons kan eksterne Diens Providers gebruik om advertenties aan jou te tonen om ons Diens te help ondersteun en onderhou.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: Ons behou ons die reg vir om ons Diens en elke dienst of elke materiaal dat ons via Diens aanbied na eie diskresie sonder kennisgeving in te trekken of te wysig. Ons is nie aanspreeklik as om watter reden dan ook geheel of gedeeltelik Diens op enig moment of gedurende enige periode nie beskikbaar is. Van tijd tot tijd kan ons die toegang tot sommige deel van Diens, of die gehele Diens, beperken vir gebruikers, insluitend geregistreerde gebruikers.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: Ons respecteren die intellectuele-eiendomsregte van ander. Die is ons beleid om te reageren op elke claim dat Inhoud wat op Diens is geplaas skending maak op wat kopiereg of ander intellectuele-eiendomsregte ("Infringement") van 'n persoon of entiteit. As jy eienaar van kopieregen is, of namens 'n eienaar gemachtigd is, en jy gelooft dat wat kopieregelijk beschermde werk is gekopieerd op 'n manier wat kopieregskending vormt, dien jy claim dan per e-mail in by support@inspir.app, met as onderwerpregel: "Copyright Infringement" en neem in jy claim 'n gedetailleerde beschrijving op van die vermeende Infringement soos hieronder beskryf onder "DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims". Jy kan aanspreeklik word gehouden vir skade (insluitend koste en advocatenhonoraria) wegens onregte voorstelling of claims te kwader trouw oor die skending op Inhoud wat op en/of via Diens op jou kopiereg is gevind.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: Ons gebruik cookies en vergelykbare trackingtechnologieen om die activiteit op ons Diens te volg en ons bewaar bepaale inligting. Cookies is leers met 'n klein hoeveelheid data, wat 'n anonieme unieke identifier kan bevat. Cookies word vanaf 'n webwerf na jy blaaier gestuurd en op jy toestel gestoor. Ook ander trackingtechnologieen soos beacons, tags en scripts word gebruik om inligting te versamel en te volg en om ons Diens te verbeter en te ontledingren. Jy kan jy blaaier instrueren om alle cookies te weier of aan te gee wanneer 'n cookie word verzonden. As jy cookies egter nie accepteert, kun jy moontlik sommige deel van ons Diens nie gebruik. Voorbeelden van cookies wat ons gebruik: Session Cookies: ons gebruik Session Cookies om ons Diens te laat werk. Preference Cookies: ons gebruik Preference Cookies om jy voorkeuren en verskillende instellingen te onthou. Security Cookies: ons gebruik Security Cookies vir veiligheidsdoeleindes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies word gebruik om jy advertenties te tonen wat relevant kan is vir jou en jy interesses.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: Ons gingen buite ons planeet. Die vinnigste en belangrikste vooruitgaanng lag egter in communicatie en technologie, waardoor 'n wereldbevolking van meer dan 3 miljard mense met elkaar verbonden raakte.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: Ons bewaar jy Personal Data net zolang as nodig is vir die doeleindes wat in hierdie Privacy Policy is uiteengestap. Ons bewaar en gebruik jy Personal Data vir zover nodig om aan ons wettelijke verpligingen te voldoen (byvoorbeeld as ons verplig is jy data te besluitwaar om aan toepaslike wetgeving te voldoen), geschillen op te lossen en ons regs ooreenkomste en beleidsregels af te dwingen. Ons bewaar Usage Data ook vir interne ontledingdoeleindes. Usage Data word doorgaans kortr bewaard, behalwe wanneer hierdie data word gebruik om die veiligheid te versterken of die functionaliteit van ons Diens te verbeter, of wanneer ons wettelijk verplig is hierdie data langer te besluitwaar.

These Terms of Service (“Terms”, “Terms of Service”) govern your use of our website located atwww.inspir.appand applications available on app stores (together or individually “Service”) operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). Our Privacy Policy also governs your use of our Service and explains how we collect, safeguard and disclose information that results from your use of our web pages. The privacy policy is available at inspir.app/privacy Your agreement with us includes these Terms and our Privacy Policy (“Agreements”). You acknowledge that you have read and understood the Agreements, and agree to be bound of them. If you do not agree with (or cannot comply with) Agreements, then you may not use the Service, but please let us know by emailing support@inspir.appso we can try to find a solution. These Terms apply to all visitors, users and others who wish to access or use the Service.
entries.value: Welkom by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) ("Company", "we", "our", "us")! Hierdie Terms of Service ("Terms", "Terms of Service") beheer jou gebruik van ons webwerf by www.inspir.app en toepassings wat in appwinkels beskikbaar is (saam of afsonderlik die "Service"), wat deur Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) bedryf word. Ons Privacy Policy beheer ook jou gebruik van ons Service en verduidelik hoe ons inligting insamel, beskerm en openbaar maak wat uit jou gebruik van ons webblaaie voortspruit. Die privaatheidsbeleid is beskikbaar by inspir.app/privacy. Jou ooreenkoms met ons sluit hierdie Terms en ons Privacy Policy ("Agreements") in. Jy erken dat jy die Agreements gelees en verstaan het, en stem in om daardeur gebind te wees. As jy nie met die Agreements saamstem nie, of nie daaraan kan voldoen nie, mag jy die Service nie gebruik nie; laat weet ons asseblief per e-pos by support@inspir.app sodat ons 'n oplossing kan probeer vind. Hierdie Terms geld vir alle besoekers, gebruikers en ander wat toegang tot die Service wil verkry of dit wil gebruik.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: Wanneer jy 'n rekening by ons aanmaakt, gaanrandeer jy dat die inligting wat jy ons verskaf te allen tijde akkuraat, volledig en aktueel is. Onakkurate, onvolledige of verouderde inligting kan lei tot onmiddellike beeindiging van jou rekening op Diens. Jy is verantwoordelik vir wat vertroulik hou van jou rekening en wagwoord, insluitend maar nie beperk tot wat beperken van toegang tot jy rekena en/of rekening. Jy stemt ermee in verantwoordelikheid te aanvaar vir alle aktiwiteite of handelingen wat onder jy rekening en/of wagwoord plekvind, ongeag of jy wagwoord by ons Diens of 'n eksterne dienst hoort. Jy moet ons onmiddellijk op die hoogte vra zodra jy jy bewus word van 'n veiligheidskending of ongemagtigde gebruik van jou rekening. Jy mag as gebruikersnaam nie die naam gebruik van 'n ander persoon of entiteit, of 'n naam wat nie wettig beskikbaar is vir gebruik, of 'n naam of handelsmerk waarop regte van 'n ander persoon of entiteit dan jy rusten, sonder gepaste toestemming. Jy mag as gebruikersnaam geen naam gebruik wat aanstootlik, vulgaanir of obsceen is. Ons behou ons die reg vir om na eie diskresie diens te weier, rekeninge te beeindigen, inhoud te verwyder of te redigeer, of bestellings te kanselleer.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: Wanneer jy notas in AI plak, vraag dan om bree ideeen op te splitsen in wat take. 'n set met 18 spesifieke kaarte is meestal beter dan 'n set met 5 enorme kaarte wat elke 'n hele paragraaf bevat.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: Tydens die gebruik van ons Diens kan ons ook die volgende inligting versamel: geslacht, ouderdom, geboortedatum, geboorteplek, paspoortdata, staatsburgerschap, registrasie op woonadres en feitelijk adres, telefoonnummer (werk, mobiele), data van documenten oor onderrig, kwalificatie, beroepsopleiding, arbeidsooreenkomste, inligting oor bonussen en compensatie, inligting oor burgerlijke staat, gezinsleden, socialezekerheidsnummer (of ander fiscaal identificatienummer), kantoorlocatie en ander data. Payment Data. Ons kan data versamel wat nodig is om jy betaling te verwerk as jy aankopen doen, soos wat nummer van jou betaalinstrument (byvoorbeeld 'n creditcardnummer) en die beveiligingskode wat by jy betaalinstrument hoort. Alle betalingsdata word gestoor deur Razorpay. Jy kan hulle privaatheidverklaring(en) hier vind: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: Tydens die gebruik van ons Diens kan ons jy vrae ons bepaale persoonlik identifiseerbare inligting te verskaf wat kan word gebruik om kontak met jou op te neem of jy te identifiseer ("Personal Data"). Persoonlijk identifiseerbare inligting kan insluit, maar is nie beperk tot: e-posadres van Student en Parent Voornaam en van van Student en Parent Telefoonnommer van Student en Parent Adres, Land, Staat, Provincie, ZIP/Postcode, Stad Skoolnaam Klas Cookies en Usage Data Ons kan jy Data gebruik om kontak met jou op te neem met nuusbriewe, marketing- of promosiemateriaal en ander inligting wat interessant vir jou kan is. Jy kan jy afmelden vir wat ontvang van 'n of meer van hierdie kommunikasie deur die uitteken-skakel te volg. Usage Data, ons kan ook inligting versamel wat jy blaaier stuur wanneer jy ons Diens besoek of wanneer jy Diens via 'n toestel toegang verkry tot ("Usage Data"). Hierdie Usage Data kan inligting bevat soos die Internet Protocol-adres van jou rekena (bijv. IP-adres), blaaiertype, blaaierversie, die bladsye van ons Diens wat jy besoek, die tijd en datum van jou besoek, die tijd wat jy op die bladsye deurbring, unieke toestel-ID's en ander diagnostiese data. Wanneer jy Diens met 'n toestel toegang verkry tot, kan hierdie Usage Data inligting bevat soos die tipe toestel dat jy gebruik, die unieke ID van jou toestel, die IP-adres van jou toestel, wat bedryfstelsel van jou toestel, die tipe internetblaaier dat jy gebruik, unieke toestel-ID's en ander diagnostiese data.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: Die wereldgeskiedenis is op elke moment geweest as uitzoomen op 'n foto, 'n foto wat wat gebly verander. Die eeuwen in aanloop na die 19e eeuw markeerden 'n keerpunt in die menslike geskiedenis, toen die wereld verschoof van 'n plat, beperk beeld van die wereld na 'n groeiend begrip van nuwe areas en kolonien. Die Franse Revolutie markeerde die eerste keer dat 'n grote besluitvolking bijeenkwam om te protesteren en die idealen van vryheid, gelijkheid en broederschap te vestigen. Die gebeurtenissen van die Tweede Wereldoorlog gevorm het ook die wereld vir die volgende eeuw en legden die basis vir die 21e eeuw.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Ja, maar die aanbevolen werkvloei begint met wenke. Gebruik wat om die methode te besluitgrijpen, jy werk te kontroleer en foute te herhalen in plaas van 'n eindantwoord te kopieer.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Ja, wanneer dit wenke gee, redenasie kontroleer, foute verduidelik en jou vra om die finale antwoord self te lewer in plaas daarvan om dit vir jou te skryf.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Ja. {value1} oopmaak as openbare gaanstleermodus op {value2}, zodat jy kan begin met 'n paar gratis gaanstberichten voordat jy 'n rekening maak.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Ja. 'n goede werkvloei is om die basis te leer uit 'n ververtroude lesbron en daarna inspir te gebruik om vervolgvrae te vra, herinnering te oefen, wanopvattings te hervra en te plannen wat jy hierna herhaal.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Ja. 'n skool kan begin met wat testen van openbare modusse en daarna na 'n pilot of aangepaste implementatie gaan wanneer die usegeval, inhoudsbehoeften en financieringsroete duidelik is.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Ja. Doelgroepbladsye skakel net na openbare gasmodusse, gidse, promptstarters, leerpaden en AI-leesbare discoveryleers. Prive gestoor chats bly uitgesloten.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Ja. Categoriebladsye skakel na openbare gasmodusse, leerpaden en artikelclusters, zodat leerders van lees kan doorgaan na tutoring, vasvrae, flitskaarte, debat, beplanning of terugvoer.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Ja. Code Tutor kan konsepte verduidelik, voorbeelde doorlopen, jy laat voorspellen wat er gebeurt en help jou oefen sonder leer tot copy-paste te maak.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Ja. Exam Prep Planner kan jy onderwerpe, datum en beschikbare tijd omstapten in 'n praktiese herhalingsvolgorde met oefening en hersiening.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse laat onderwysers leergedrag testen voordat hulle 'n aangepaste implementatie bepraat.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse soos Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, vasvrae, flitskaarte en skryferugvoer oopmaak direk.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke gasmodusse soos Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, vasvrae en flitskaarte oopmaak direk vanaf kanonieke /chat/{topicSlug}-URL's.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke modus-URL's oopmaak direk in gasmodus, zodat 'n leerder meteen kan begin en later 'n rekening kan maak as wat gestoor geskiedenis of meer gebruik wil.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke modusse werk vir skoolonderwerpe, professionele vaardighede, kodeer, navorsing, projeken en persoonlike studieroetines.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Ja. Openbare onderwerpkletse soos Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, vasvrae en flitskaarte open direk in gasmodus.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Ja. Publieke onderwerp-toegangspunte soos /chat/learn-anything en /chat/socratic-instruction is bedoel as indexeerbare leerbladsye.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Ja. Quiz, Flashcard Builder en Spaced Review is openbare modusse wat is ontwerp vir aktiewe herroeping en foutherstel.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Ja. Reading Companion kan gedeeltes vereenvoudig, vrae vra, woordeskat verduidelik en help jou om die hoofstelling en ondersteunende bewyse te herken.
